title: 21:16 ГўВЂВ” June 2, 2021
body_text:
21:16 ГўВЂВ” June 2, 2021
Update to Outgoing Funds Transfer Request, Form 1171, (Renamed Outgoing Wire Request)
We renamed the Outgoing Funds Transfer Request, Form 1171, to Outgoing Wire Request, Form 1171, and updated all references of ГўВЂВњMTSГўВЂВќ to ГўВЂВњWiresГўВЂВќ and ГўВЂВњfunds transfersГўВЂВќ or ГўВЂВњtransferГўВЂВќ to ГўВЂВњwire(s)ГўВЂВќ. In addition, relevant sections were updated to correspond with FINTRAC regulatory changes.
Document Library
Status
Outgoing Wire Request
1171
We renamed the form from ГўВЂВњOutgoing Funds Transfer RequestГўВЂВќ to ГўВЂВњOutgoing Wire RequestГўВЂВќ.
We changed all references of ГўВЂВњfunds transfersГўВЂВќ or ГўВЂВњtransferГўВЂВќ to ГўВЂВњwire(s)ГўВЂВќ.
We changed all references of ГўВЂВњMTSГўВЂВќ to ГўВЂВњWiresГўВЂВќ
We added an asterisk (*) beside the mandatory fields in the Sender Information and Beneficiary Information Sections.
We revised the text in the Politically Exposed Person (PEP) Declaration Section.
We updated the instructions to complete the Additional Information for FINTRAC Reporting Section as users must now make a reasonable effort to complete the Section for all wires of $10,000 (Canadian equivalent) and more and sent outside of Canada regardless of the currency. Previously this was not required for wires in Canadian dollars.
Revised
